description: Host-to-host movement patterns (SMB, PsExec, RDP, etc.) reproduced with a CALDERA adversary for observation.
expected_telemetry: Same-credential or abnormal hop signals in NDR
safety_notes: No credential brute force or indiscriminate wide scans. Use lab-only accounts on an isolated network.
cleanup_notes: Review shared sessions and remote service state; snapshot revert is often appropriate after lateral movement.
